headline: Zcash Risks Plummet 90% After AI Audit

article.title: Anthropic's Mythos AI finds no more 'serious' bugs in Zcash: Wilcox
article.summary: Zcash founder Zooko Wilcox said Anthropic's Mythos AI model found no further "serious bugs" in the privacy protocol following the patching of a previously discovered forgery bug.

headline: Bitcoin Sales Key to $1Bn Crypto Credit Growth

article.title: Bitcoin sales are necessary for Strategy's digital credit business, Saylor says
article.summary: Strategy's recent Bitcoin sale appeared to clash with Saylor's "never sell" mantra, but he says the move reflects how the company's digital credit business works.

article.title: Fed and BOE Stay Guarded After 100 Days of Iran War
article.summary: For several global central banks, the question of whether the Iran war poses more of an immediate danger to inflation or to growth is likely to remain open in the coming week.

headline: CLO ETFs Surge 15% Amid Rate Spike

article.title: CLO ETFs Boom on Higher Rates, Private Debt Woes
article.summary: Wall Street has an answer for retail investors seeking to profit from elevated interest rates and dodge defaults in private credit: funds that buy collateralized loan obligations.

headline: Google Sues China Group Over $100M Crypto Scam
